skill_text:
A Hugging Face model for converting Persian and English text into video. Framework: Hugging Face. Functionality: Text-to-Video. API call: pipeline('text-to-video', model='ImRma/Brucelee'). This tool has no required input fields.
When to use:
- Use `hugging_face__imrma_brucelee__pipeline_text_to_video_model_imrma_brucelee` when the user's request directly matches this tool's purpose.
- This tool has no required input fields.
- Use examples to map paraphrases into schema-faithful arguments.
When not to use:
- Do not call this tool when required inputs are missing or ambiguous.
- Do not invent unsupported parameters or unsupported enum values.
- Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
